Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c1 (seed+1) -- moonlit path with layered depth (near mushrooms, mid path, far light-shaft trees), on-palette moss/verdigris, no legible text artifacts. c0 was a close-up prop-like mushroom cluster (insufficient depth for a wide backdrop); c2 read as a tiled/repeated mushroom pattern; c3 had garbled text-like marks baked into the paint -- all rejected.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse. Deviation from the standard chain: cutout.py's BiRefNet salient-object segmentation was NOT run -- verified empirically that it discards ~97% of a full-bleed atmospheric backdrop as 'background' (isolates only the single most-salient object), which breaks the AssetKind.Backdrop 'fills the plane' contract. Instead the raw 1024x1024 SDXL output was format-converted straight to a fully-opaque RGBA (no normalmap.py -- AssetSpec.NormalMap=false, flat far plane per GloomwoodSpecs.cs).
